reviews.review_description: I wasn't sure what to expect but I found this app not only interesting but educational. Seeing the photos from those times, and being able to tour and "interact" with the house made it more immersing for me personally. Doesn't take long to walk through and then I deleted it. I recommend it if you are wanting to learn about this subject in more detail.
Best hide and seek player🔥🔥
10/10 would hide here again
Shi was gas 🔥🔥🔥

reviews.review_title: Does not work on my headset
reviews.review_description: For some reason this app does not work properly on my oculus and as interested it looks, I just am not mobile within this app.

this is Amazing. It hits hard because what this poor girl went though is horrible. She was so close to escape, but like many it was to hard. The music is what gets me it is calm, soft, sad, it helps you feel and understand, you see what she saw you feel what she felt, and when you look around you together were you are and get lost in time and just sit and stare. I could never imagine what people went through during WWll but this really opened my eyes even more. This is what they should teach in school, these stories are losing there value people froget. But these stories need to be remembered not forgotten. This happened. These things happen but it gets lost or rewritten. It is sad to see this happen but this exist this is here. More people need to hear this story of lost and truth. But what i am trying to say is that it is perfect.
It helps convey the reality she experienced. So sad that Zionists are now committing similar inhumanity against Palestinians. Love is stronger than hate.
I thought i was gonna play as anne frank

Hope younger generations will remain aware of what took place in these years and this documentary type app helps. Thank you Vertigo for making this a free app. 

Let us all make sure this can never happen again.
I found this while looking for virtual tours for my homeschooler. WOW. This is absolutely beyond what I was expecting. What an opportunity!
Very nice of touring houze room. Good so and beginning cool story good fun. And Frankie was good people bad mean people happen. Maybe thank And Frankie for so ok and nice houze.

Doesn't work at all for me whatever I select nothing happens 
Uninstalled it
Ts was such a fun game. The graphics were absolutely insane. Love the fighting elements. Definitely worth trying, awesome game.
Loved the book, this put it into perspective even more. RIP Anne 🙏

I'm a WW II fan - I love learning about this era. It was awful and I often wonder how I'd cope with what happened.
This is a small but beautifully crafted story/tour of the Frank House with accounts read from the diary as you move through.
I found it moving, interesting and sad.
Graphics are atmospheric, sound is good and the whole product is a beautiful and interesting experience. Thank you, Devs. Love it.
So moving to wonder around the house, such a sad time but thank you for allowing this in vr

She is worth remembering, just like all the good folks in this world. Luckily they found her diary.  Her last few years digitized into an app. It shows the rooms, items, her ideas, feelings, hope and dreams.

This will move you.  It's absolutely life like. If this was the only thing I could access with my VR it would be worth it.  Great care and respect was taken in this creation... what would Anne think! ♡♡ A must have for any human.
I love to see this knowing that I don’t have to pay to see the real house but I also think is cool that you can see what she lived like on be is feels real I really love it
I thought I was going to play as Anne frank hiding from nazis but instead its like going to the museum it could have been a really good game.

I selected the tour and it is completely black with nothing but the sound of feet on squeaky floorboards. Very disappointed as I have always wanted to visit the annex after reading her diary. No wonder this app is free. It doesn’t function at all.
It’s so detailed, it looks like you’re really there. It’s so interesting that you get to see what it looked like and you get to learn history! 10/10.

I was creeped out at first but then it really felt like real live . This was really helpfull cuz I am learning about Anne Frank in school so I am going to tell my teacher and I didn’t even search anything up it was just there on the App Store . I believe that this was incredibly useful,helpful and very good explanation on what happens in her life as a child . She has been through al lot of struggles in her life

reviews.review_title: Was so sad I almost lost it
reviews.review_description: Sometimes you go to a physical place and feel the bad vibes because something bad happened there. I felt that same feeling in vr. It's a trip. I felt like I could smell the air.

I’ve never been able to visit in person so it was great to experience through the Quest. This story is heavy, especially given present day tensions, so I was glad to experience this but was also brought to tears.
Second best way to see this place.  I’ve always wanted to go after reading the book as a child.  Helped me better understand after being able to virtually walk through the house.  Well done!!
Cannot state loudly enough that if you can't get to the real Anne Frank House then you take this virtual tour. It is free so you have no excuse and this is a story that the world needs to hear.
I came here to play games not going to school
when i was playing it scared me so i went off and deleted it 👍 but it was good
New VR experience for me, would be really cool with more things like this to educate and learn about history.

reviews.review_title: I'd love to see more things like this
reviews.review_description: I thought itd just be an interesting thing to try. Made me cry. Brough the whole thing to a new perspective. If I could give it more stars, i would in a heartbeat.

Definitely take the story tour. A beautiful experience. It doesn’t have a lot of repeat value, but I think we all expected that. It’s a great way to educate family and friends about Anne Frank and her families experience.

The diary of Anne Frank is my Favorite, I talked about it in class, read it, and I truly like the story. Any other history story would be boring to me but this, I was invested and now seeing this on VR!?!
This is really cool, I wish more games where like this. I would give 💯 for everything no problems at all and very informative.
i cant do it without felling im going to get jumpscaref😭
I feel confident that my knowledge of Anne frank has grown exponentially after using this app

I like many people learned about Anne Frank but I had never read the book this experience is so sad and so emotional world war has always interested me and I knew so so little about Anne Frank and I couldn't imagine the amount of fear she had felt everyday it's such a shame how the camp she died in with her sister was raided and saved only a short time later I highly recommend this if I say World war history interest you I don't think I can't look at humanity the same way after this 10/10 definitely going to give the book a read now
Amazing and heartbreaking historical tour. Very immersive and has excellent presentation.
What a beautiful way to apply VR technology. This left me pondering for a long while afterward. I would love to see this idea applied to more historically significant places.

The book was incredibly moving, and I was so looking forward to seeing the house in VR. But you obviously need a hall to be able to do the tour. Despite having a room with several free square meters, I constantly couldn't reach something because it was outside the boundary. So, 5 stars for the idea, 1 for the technical implementation.

My god just wonderful I recently read the play and wondered if I could be in the house. This app made that happen. But one thing was that it just really showed how much of an awful person  Anne was . my golly I feel awful for those in the house with her.  other than that I was in tears after.
Couldn’t enter the house which was the only reason I wanted it.  im using quest 3
Excellent, quality work and very moving.
This was absolutely unbelievable. You are transported right in the annex. I have always wondered what this place would have been like since I was twelve when I read the book. Thank you!!

I’m a 15 year old boy from Britain and I honestly just installed this game out of sheer curiosity, and leaving the game made me just feel shot, such a massive impact. Honestly puts you in her shoes and it’s truly upsetting to look around the area.

I’m not joking or exaggerating. I just finished this short 30 minute or so experience and I don’t think I’ll ever see the world in the same way again. My heartfelt thanks to the developers. And, to whoever is reading this, you should experience this short story as well.

I was constantly in tears by the story telling of this game and how tragic it was to get to the end . The game goes more in depth about what happened to her and what her living situation was when the n@zis invaded her home town.

This was a sad sad game as it was interesting and sad because as u walk through you can he planes going over car going pass and I wanted to cry as in some point I would just stand there and nearly cry because as I looked around I had realised how much I take for granted the vr i played it on she would of loved to see something like that and the photos and just everything being realistic made me feel scared as I would be sad she kept staying positive and just kept writing it’s truly a piece of art I was going to record it for a video but then I decided not to and to just feel immersed
I'm peter and I'm just saying the Anne voice actor isn't annoying as heck so unrealistic

Man, this felt a little "too" real. Incredible detail from the items inside, the excerpts being read from the diary, and the noises from outside. I loved sitting down in Anne's favorite spot in the loft. Felt like I was really there. Wish I could tell that little girl that the world has learned from this mistake, but sadly it's no different today, almost 80 years later.

I know the story of Anne Frank, but this is something that I think everyone should see. I had to keep looking down at my own floor just so that I could recenter myself. Because, you can here sounds in the background as you look around and move throughout the house, it really is like you are there.

It is a oK that I learn stuff it’s just it was really boring. If you want your kids to learn stuff, then get VR and only purchase or get free books on there that will tell you the stories if they grab stuff and they can’t walk around they just have to yeah I think people don’t like this they learn if you are a parent wanting your kid to learn download this if you’re not a parent, not wanting to learn, don’t download this like I accidentally did!!!
Informative, yes but also actually quite boring compared to a lot of the other more interactive and fun games available on vr
I beat it to this game
To be honest it's just creepy to me but graphics are really good

I’m a complete novice with VR and I got stuck at the bottom of the stairs and was unable to proceed with exploring the house or exiting. I’m sure my inexperience was to blame, but there should be a way to activate a help menu.  Otherwise, the content that I was able to access was very well done.
The graphics are disappointing the ability to participate was disappointing. It felt like something the public library would feature when I was a kid.
tbh I downloaded this game to actually be Anne frank but turns out I was just myself and I couldn’t fight hitler

As other reviewers have noted the app no longer functions. The option for tour mode  is now grayed out and can't be selected. Story mode is dangerously buggy, requiring you to exit far beyond your guardian boundaries in order to activate objects (I crawled over the top of a couch just to test it.)

it’s legit just an game about Anne frank so I was hardly interested.

Operation Market Garden is cooler.
Probably the worst game on oculus, Very clickbait. where’s Adolf?
Can not open any door, no help from customer service
i installed but really want it removed from my library. i uninstalled this app but see it all the time. there are several app I would like to remove and not see in my library.
Disappointed that the tour option does not work. Sounds like it’s great and I would love to see it.
I have tried going through the tour since Christmas Day.  Fix it@$@.
If you love your history and learning about world war this a a emotional experience to play and listening to the story and places they used to hid away from the awful nazis
I was only given option for history info. The option of touring her home isn't available

reviews.review_title: Needs to be adapted to disabled people
reviews.review_description:
A great experience! But not very weel adapted for disabled people. My mum tried it, she's in wheelchair. I thought it was a great idea to make her try the vr experience because she will never be able to climb the stairs in the real house. But the experience itself wasn't really adapted to her, she had to get up (with many difficulties) to live the experience.
But still remains a very nice moment!

developer_response.body:
Hello Camille.valle,
Thank you for your support.  The Anne Frank experience was specifically designed with people with mobility problems in mind.  All you have to do is set the oculus in stationary  mode and from a sitting position.  There is way to navigate without walking (using the pointer with the ‘feet’ icon) Then your mum can visit the house from her point of view.
If you have more difficulties, please email support@forcefieldxr.com.

reviews.review_description: It does not let me interact with almost nothing. There are a lot of what seems like hidden doors I can't look into. I want to check and see everything. I want to understand what they have and how they lived. But this app does not let me. I have a lot of questions left unanswered. It wants to tell us a short story, but does not let us explore the subject. This app has no place in the VR word in this form, it's basically a 360 video, as there's not real interactivity.

reviews.review_title: Awful adaptation of a worthy subject
reviews.review_description: This is a terrible VR app.  You can't skip the endless, flat introduction.  (Repeated viewing must take the patience of a saint.)  Worse still, narration is annoyingly delivered using in present tense (-- common in American documentaries but insanely irritiating for those of us who live in countries with more than 200 years of history).  By the time I reached the tedious, barely-interactive environment, I'd lost the will to carry on.   It may have a worthy subject but this VR app is truly awful.
I expected to see at least a bit of action, what is this game, I want a refund
Why is it now allowing me to view the tour mode? Only the story mode?

developer_response.body: You must play through story mode before unlocking the tour mode.

reviews.review_title: This is worse than history class
reviews.review_description:
It hurts me
No plot
Being a Jew is boring
In VR I just toured Anne Frank’s house. Very powerful to compare her sheltering in place to this day’s. We have it good comparatively.

reviews.review_title: Seems to require an American-sized room
reviews.review_description:
You have to do the 'story mode' before it'll let you do the Tour mode.

But the Story mode constantly requires you to interact on objects that are beyond the Guardian space in my Dutch-sized apartment. I've tried pretty much every combination of buttons and gestures, and can't figure out how to access them.

There isn't any help or instructions in the app.

Erg vervelend!

developer_response.body: Hello there.  Sorry to hear you are having troubles.  You can 'navigate' by using the controllers to get you closer to objects. Look for the 'footprints' on the ground and then use the trigger on the controls to go there. Let me know if this helped!

reviews.review_title: This is the worst simulator ever
reviews.review_description: I wanted to scream in the Secret Annex and stomp around and then watch Germans rush the building. This app promised me an experienced and didn't deliver in the least. Also you have to finish story mode to discover on your own. Basically you could get a better video tour of the house if you actually wanted a tour.
This  thing froze my Oculus. I want it fixed now

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are having issues.  Please send us an email to support@forcefieldxr.com and let's see if we can fix the problem.

reviews.review_title: There was so much more to do...
reviews.review_description: This should have been treated with more care. Very long. Boring. I can picture the attempt but This kinda memory tour isn’t making you feel anything about the depth of this tragedy. Anne Franck VR experience should have been treated by some people like Felix and paul because it is the sensitivity that must guide the development of such experiences. Too bad this is the experience that might be shown in school and educational courses...

It works great on the Go, but barely functions on the Quest. You are given two options in the Menu, a Story Mode and a Tour Mode. It will not even let me select the Tour Mode. I can select the Story Mode and skip over the story to get to the Tour but I can not interact with the environment or go in any rooms. I am just stuck in a hallway. The funny thing is there is a little demo on how to interact with the environment and I can go through the Demo, but nothing works for the actual Tour. I have tried uninstalling and reinstalling , rebooting, and a factory reset and nothing changes. I guess I will have to just use the app on the Go. I was really hoping it would work on the Quest because I figured it would be a better experience. I e-mailed support and am waiting for a reply. It is a free App so there is nothing to lose by trying it and it was a great experience on the Go for me.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are having issues with the product. To get to the tour mode you must first play the story mode once.  i hope you try it again!  And if you are still having issues, please send an email to support@forcefieldxr.com.

reviews.review_description: boring. uninstalled after a few minutes. might be interesting to you. don't know. wasn't at all to me. i like history and i read often so i thought this would be something that held my interest but i was wrong.
